'''Antarian peas''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of shelled pea that could be eaten. The peas were grown in the [[Garden/Legends|gardens]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], and they were used in various recipes including [[Endorian chicken pot pie]], which was served in the [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]] [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] on Coruscant.

==Biology and appearance==
Antarian peas were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of pea, itself a variety of [[Vegetable/Legends|vegetable]]. They grew with shells that were removed prior to consumption.<ref name="Y:DR" /> The peas could be eaten by members of the [[Besalisk/Legends|Besalisk]] species.<ref name="DaD" />

==History==
On the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], Antarian peas were grown in the [[Garden/Legends|gardens]] of the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] for use in cooking. At some point prior to [[Gender/Legends|her]] [[Death/Legends|death]]<ref name="Y:DR" /> in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]]<ref name="ERC">''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]''</ref> the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jang Li-Li]] wondered if using [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] to shell the peas was an abuse of power while collecting vegetables on dinner duty with the [[Gran/Legends|Gran]] [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Maks Leem]] at the Jedi Temple.<ref name="Y:DR" /> Before the destruction of [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] during [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire's]] first two [[Standard year/Legends|years]],<ref name="DexEra">''[[The Last of the Jedi: Underworld]]'', which ''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' dates to around [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], establishes that [[Dex's Diner/Legends|Dex's Diner]] was destroyed by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the Empire's [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]], so Dex's Diner was destroyed either during 19 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|BBY]] or 18 BBY.</ref> [[Dexter Jettster/Legends|Dexter Jettster]], the Besalisk [[Chef/Legends|chef]] who owned the Coruscant [[Restaurant/Legends|restaurant]], combined Antarian peas, [[celonslay]], [[Carrot/Legends|space carrots]], and [[Tip-yip/Legends|Endorian chicken]] meat inside a flaky [[Pom seed flour]] crust in his recipe for [[Endorian chicken pot pie]].<ref name="DaD" />

==Behind the scenes==
Antarian peas were first mentioned in the [[2004]] novel ''[[Yoda: Dark Rendezvous]]'', which was written by [[Sean Stewart]].<ref name="Y:DR" /> They were later mentioned in the [[StarWars.com]] [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] exclusive article "[[Dining at Dex's]]," which was released in [[2009]] and written by [[Gregory Walker]] in the style of an [[in-universe]] menu. The peas shared their name<ref name="DaD" /> with the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] [[Antar/Legends|Antar]], its [[Moon/Legends|moons]] [[Antar 4/Legends|Antar 4]] and [[Antar 5]],<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> as well as the group known as the [[Antarian Rangers/Legends|Antarian Rangers]].<ref name="HG">''[[Hero's Guide]]''</ref> Neither source that mentioned the peas made any connection between them and these other entities.<ref name="Y:DR" /><ref name="DaD" />
